Quarterly Data Report

The table below summarizes the measured throughput for each region across the last reporting period, along with the notes our analysts attached to every row during the review meeting this quarter.

RegionScore
North42
South37
East51

These figures feed the capacity plan and are revisited whenever the underlying demand assumptions shift by a meaningful amount over time.
